nasb.text: Amon was twenty-two years old when he became king, and he reigned two years in Jerusalem; and his mother’s name was Meshullemeth the daughter of Haruz of Jotbah.

esv.text: Amon was twenty-two years old when he began to reign, and he reigned two years in Jerusalem. His mother’s name was Meshullemeth the daughter of Haruz of Jotbah.

cnv.text: 亞們登基時是二十二歲；他在耶路撒冷作王二年。他母親名叫米舒利密，來自約提巴，是哈魯斯的女兒。

ccb.text: 亚们二十二岁登基，在耶路撒冷执政两年。他母亲叫米舒利密，是约提巴人哈鲁斯的女儿。
